name: get_token_price
description: Get the current price of a cryptocurrency token by symbol or CoinGecko ID

arguments.name: token
arguments.desc: Token symbol (e.g. ETH, BTC) or CoinGecko ID

name: search_tokens
description: Search for cryptocurrency tokens by name or symbol

arguments.name: query
arguments.desc: Search query for token name or symbol

name: get_token_info
description: Get detailed information about a token including market cap, volume, and description

name: get_top_tokens
description: Get the top tokens by market cap

name: get_eth_balance
description: Get the ETH balance of an Ethereum address

name: get_token_balance
description: Get the ERC-20 token balance of an address

name: get_wallet_holdings
description: Get all token holdings for an Ethereum wallet

name: get_multichain_balance
description: Get native balances across multiple blockchain networks

arguments.name: address
arguments.desc: Wallet address to check across chains

name: get_eth_gas
description: Get current Ethereum gas prices in Gwei

name: get_multichain_gas
description: Get gas prices across multiple blockchain networks

name: get_dex_quote_eth
description: Get a DEX swap quote on Ethereum via 1inch

name: get_dex_quote_sol
description: Get a DEX swap quote on Solana via Jupiter
